title: Laissez tirer les tireurs
writer: Michel Lebrun, Georges Roitfeld, Gilles Morris-Dumoulin
actors: Eddie Constantine, Daphné Dayle, Maria Grazia Spina
plot: FBI agent Jeff Gordon is to investigate the theft of a US missile prototype. The suspect Anderson, however, is found dead. Jeff Gordon's only lead is the photograph of a woman that Gordon finds among Anderson's papers.
